an1.198:1.1: "This, *bhikkhus*, is the foremost among my *bhikkhu* disciples who conjure mind-made bodies — namely, Cūḷapanthaka.
an1.199:1.1: … who are skilled in the transformation of mind — namely, Cūḷapanthaka.
an1.200:1.1: … who are skilled in the transformation of *saññā* — namely, Mahāpanthaka.
an1.201:1.1: … who dwell in non-conflict — namely, Subhūti.
an1.202:1.1: … who are worthy of offerings — namely, Subhūti.
an1.203:1.1: … who dwell in the forest — namely, Revata Khadiravaniya.
an1.205:1.1: … who are of aroused energy — namely, Soṇa Koḷivisa.
an1.206:1.1: … who speak beautifully — namely, Soṇa Kuṭikaṇṇa.
an1.208:1.1: … who are liberated by faith — namely, Vakkalī."
